title: crotalaria recumbens
intro: Crotalaria recumbens, also known as the creeping rattlebox, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria recumbens include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites and poison. In terms of herbal preparations, Crotalaria recumbens can be made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
